name: Savoury Tenderloin with Red Currant Sauce
recipeIngredient: Pinch of Black pepper, fresh ground
recipeInstructions:
1. Tuck under the thin end of the tenderloin to make an even thickness throughout.
2. In a small bowl, combine mustard, thyme, savory, marjoram, salt, and black pepper to make a smooth paste.
3. Spread or rub the paste all over the tenderloin.
4. Roll the tenderloin in chopped parsley to coat evenly.
5. Place on a rack in a shallow roasting pan.
6. Roast uncovered at 375°F for 30 to 35 minutes, or until the meat is slightly pink inside and the meat thermometer reads 160°F.
7. To make sauce: In a small pot over medium-low heat, melt the jam. Stir in mustard until smooth.
8. Stir in vinegar and season with salt and pepper.
9. Pour the sauce over sliced tenderloin.
10. Serve with peas, carrots, and pasta.
